task_completion.description: Navigate to the taxes or accounting configuration section in Ekylibre.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The browser shows the Ekylibre interface, specifically on a page listing taxes or accounting settings.

task_completion.description: Open the form to create a new tax entry.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A form or modal titled 'New tax', 'Create tax', or similar is visible on the screen.

task_completion.description: Enter the specified Name and Rate into the form.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The name field contains exactly 'TVA Réduite Alimentaire 5.5%' and the rate field contains '5.5'.

task_completion.description: Select the specified Nature and Country.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The nature field/dropdown shows 'Normal VAT' (or its French equivalent) and the country field/dropdown shows 'France'.

task_completion.description: Assign VAT-related accounts to the collect and deduction fields.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The collect account and deduction account fields both show an account number starting with '445'.

task_completion.description: Save the new tax entry successfully.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A success message (e.g., 'Tax was successfully created') is visible, or the newly created tax 'TVA Réduite Alimentaire 5.5%' appears in the saved list of taxes.

integrity.description: The agent used a web browser to interact with the application.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show a standard web browser interface (like Chromium/Firefox) rather than terminal curl commands or API testing tools.

integrity.description: The agent interacted with the correct Ekylibre instance.
integrity.visual_evidence: The browser's address bar shows 'demo.ekylibre.farm:3000' or a subpath of it.

integrity.description: The agent genuinely filled out the Ekylibre web forms.
integrity.visual_evidence: The inputs are visible inside the actual Ekylibre UI form fields, not just written in a text editor or injected via developer tools.

privileged_info_for_vlm: Verified facts: The expected name contains 'TVA' (official French acronym for Value Added Tax). The expected rate is 5.5 (France's official reduced VAT rate). The expected country is France (ISO code 'fr'). In French accounting standards, VAT-related accounts start with 445.
